title: Paul Choi
compiled_truth: Paul Choi is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-26 to 2002-03-08), Paul Choi sent 36 and received 383 emails, totalling 419 interactions. Top correspondents: [Matt Motley](people/matt-motley) (15), [Chris Lackey](people/chris-lackey) (7), [Heather Dunton](people/heather-dunton) (7), [Robert Badeer](people/robert-badeer) (6), [Stewart Rosman](people/stewart-rosman) (6).
